scripts.bundle: ([ -f .env.local ] && set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a) || true; OUTFILE="${CLI_BUNDLE_OUTFILE:-./dist/doughnut-cli.bundle.mjs}"; pnpm exec esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile="$OUTFILE" --format=esm --conditions=mineru-bundle --loader:.py=text --alias:doughnut-api=../packages/doughnut-api/src/index.ts --alias:react-devtools-core=./src/shims/react-devtools-core-stub.ts --banner:js="$(printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\nimport { createRequire } from "module"; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);')" --define:CLI_VERSION=\"${CLI_VERSION:-0.1.0}\" --define:process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=\"${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:-}\" --define:process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=\"${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:-}\" --define:process.env.NODE_ENV=\"production\"
scripts.format: biome check --write src/ tests/ pythonAsTextVitePlugin.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.lint: biome check src/ tests/ pythonAsTextVitePlugin.ts vitest.config.ts
